review_title: Very reliable program!
author: Richard V.
pros: The stability of the program. No issues with administrator rights etcetera. It always works flawlesly.
cons: That we tried other products from other vendors. Because we thougt it would be a good idea to test some other products. We shouldn't.

review_title: ISL Light makes support easier
description: I use isl light at work on a daily basis. It's easy to use and easy to guide new users to receive support. It's easy to get connected and I love the feature to get admin privileges and the user just have to confirm it. Always-on function is really good as it provides a backup when VPN's or RDP have issues.
author: Andrej Š.
pros: Remote access works with no hiccups and it works on multiple OS's. The mobile version works well too. Always on is really useful.
cons: A bit of confusion with login as I have 2 accounts with the same email. Sometimes it scrambles the view when user has multiple monitors.

review_title: It's almost perfect.
description: Pretty good the sales team were very good the development team could be a bit better at responding to customer needs and issues.
author: Joshua H.
pros: Hosting the software ourselves is very comforting as we don't have to rely on other servers if it goes down we are to blame. Reading the customer the ID is very nice versus the other way around as it helps prevent errors and gets read at a consistent rate. Also being able to email and transfer the session is very helpful. The software file transfer is the best I've tried much faster than the competitors.
cons: A couple of things that I wish would be improved would be. When comparing to Teamviewer, ISL is considerably slower; if you have them sitting side by side, you will be able to complete tasks almost twice as fast with Teamviewer. When opening UAC within Windows, there is a considerable delay in displaying the Yes and No prompt that doesn't happen with Teamviewer. Multiple monitors work pretty well, but once you get past three monitors, the software starts to fall apart. It's even slower. Also, sometimes, it won't even show dialog boxes in the large zoomed-out view that exists when using Teamviewer. You won't see all the monitors at once, so you will need to toggle each monitor until you are on the right one. Switching monitors is also a drag as it's also very, very slow to display the content of each individual monitor. I've been told that one of the reasons for ISL slowness is that it is more secure than Teamviewer, and while that might be true, I wish they would give the End User the option to have faster speed/less secure or slower speeds more secure.

review_title: ISL Light Delivers Exceptional Performance and Security
description: ISL Light is an outstanding remote support solution. It combines ease of use, strong security, and excellent performance, making it a top choice for professionals who need reliable remote access.
author: Gregor Ž.
pros: I really appreciate how simple and intuitive ISL Light is to use. The connection process is fast and secure, and it works flawlessly across different platforms. The performance is excellent, even on slower networks, and the interface is clean and user-friendly. I also like the strong focus on security and privacy, which gives me confidence when working remotely. Overall, it’s a reliable and efficient tool for remote support.
cons: There’s very little to dislike, but if I had to mention something, it would be that the advanced features can take a bit of time to discover for new users. A more guided onboarding or quick tips could make the experience even better.

review_title: Reliable remote support solution that saves time for our IT team
description: I have a very good experience with ISL Light. It is fast, reliable, and easy to use for both IT support and clients. I especially appreciate that it offers everything we need while being more cost-effective than similar solutions. The software truly simplifies remote support work and boosts productivity.
author: Marko O.
pros: The program provides all the functionalities that IT support needs for efficient remote work for our custumer support (file transfer, screen sharing, system management, simple “run as” admin access, etc.). The system runs stably without interruptions. In addition, the price is excellent — more affordable than similar programs such as TV, which further increases the value of the solution. It supports both online and self-hosted installations, offering an extra advantage when choosing the deployment method. I can manage the server myself, giving me full control over all settings.
cons: I really don’t have many complaints. I didn’t encounter any major problems or glitches. It works satisfactorily even with weaker internet connections.

review_title: Great lightweight tool that puts all the simple features in one place and removes the clutter you don't need often.
description: From a user perspective, this is a very convenient tool that puts everything in one place. It doesn't get buried amongst all the open browser tabs and makes it easy to find. Setting permissions is a little cumbersome initially, but it's a very convenient tool to use once all that is set up.
author: Robert W.
pros: ISL Light is a great alternative to using the web interface. It removes a step and puts all the access that I need on a regular basis in one place. There are extra options in the web interface but since they aren't used often, it's not needed. This gives me a much simpler option and I am able to package the program and deploy through SCCM removing the need for admin rights to install.
cons: This it nitpicky. I would love to be able to alter the white background and use a custom background and not just change the image. I would also like to be able to remove the computers tab for those that don't need that access.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I like it more than I liked Teamviewer
description: Better than teamviewer, it works more reliably, no more explaining to customers to click accept EULA. I feel no need to search for other solutions.
author: Joze V.
pros: - silent install packages for unattended clients, I can make different packages for different customers so that clients are automatically arranged into my groups - technical support people are knowledgeable and fast
cons: - sometimes it seems a bit slow, specially when switching to admin mode remotely - session links should be nicer (shorter), sometimes the situation forces clients to type it manually (https://islv61.islonline.net/join/XXXXXXXX) - I do not like it that it was sold to US company

review_title: User-Friendly and Effective
description: Overall experience with ISL Light has been very positive. The software is reliable, easy to use, and secure, which makes it an excellent tool for providing remote support. I particularly appreciate how quickly sessions can be started and how smooth the connection usually is. Both technicians and end-users benefit from its simplicity, and it has definitely helped to resolve issues more efficiently
author: Lenart P.
pros: Very easy to use for both technicians and end-users Secure and reliable remote connections Quick setup with no complicated installation works on different devices and operating systems
cons: We have no real complaints about ISL Light – overall it works smoothly, reliably, and meets our support needs

review_title: Reliable Remote Support Tool That Just Works
description: A stable and trustworthy solution for remote access and support. Perfect for long-term use in IT environments.
author: Uroš Z.
pros: We have been using ISL Light for several years with a server license. It is very reliable, easy to use, and provides secure remote support without complications. "Stable, secure, and perfect for IT remote assistance."
cons: The system works reliably, but occasionally mobile support feels less polished compared to the desktop experience.

review_title: Very useful and stable program
description: ISL Online i very stable and useful program. I racomend it to everyone who need remote control and remote help.
author: David B.
pros: implicity of using it and Stability of program. Also the administrator mode is very useful and very simple to use.
cons: File transfer is not so intuitive. When transferring files is not so logical to select target folder of remote computer.

review_title: Robust, reliable and worth every penny
description: The product is robust and reliable and although I have tried competitors free versions, I know that it is well worth paying for.
author: Andrew C.
pros: It is easy for my users to setup and connect with me, especially my mum who likes to complicate things.
cons: The icons for transferring files between computers I often click the wrong one. A minor issue.

review_title: Market Leading Remote connectivity software
description: Brilliant, we've been with them for 4-5 years now after switching from Log me in as they put their prices up just as we expanded our team, ISL were great to deal with.
author: Gary P.
pros: Its very easy to use, quick to connect to users machines and never seems to freeze or have connection issues, which is vital to our business
cons: There is nothing to dislike about ISL. They contact us in good time about our renewals, the comms are really friendly and they are just a nice company to do business with

review_title: Good remote access software that does not break the bank.
description: Overall this has been a great tool. I have used many other software in this field but so far this one is the best value.
author: Walter W.
pros: Very easy to use. Has everything you could ask for in a remote desktop application. UI is easy to navigate and understand.
cons: The only con I could even give it is when you set unattended access and then go to connect to that machine it downloads and executable every time. You can just label and save that .exe and use it instead of clicking the connect in the portal. Having more than 500 end users though I just do not want to have to dig through .exe's to find the one I want.

review_title: ISL The best remote support tool.
description: Its my most important support tool, gives me fast remote access to all my exisiting end users and any new ones too.
author: Stuart S.
pros: It is fast, reliable and great value investment for my business, i could not operate without, have tried many other remote support and remote access tools this offered the best performance and value for money
cons: To date i am yet to find any fault or issues with ISL, i am very happy with the product

review_title: Couldn't do without it!
author: Andrew M.
pros: As a Charity we are always looking to find the best software at reasonable prices. The team at ISL have been fantastic for us compared to another competitor we used for years. The software is quick and easy to use for It techs and users. It is our main tool that is used everyday on the helpdesk. we particularly like the remote shutdown and restart feature and how it automatically reconnects to the same session.
cons: As of yet we haven't come across anything we don't like.

review_title: ISL Light as daily driver for remote support
description: We can not imagine our daily business without ISL Light. We run multiple connections troughout the day to offer IT support to our customers. We tried many different solutions but ISL Light at the end proved to be the most reliable, fast and easy to use for our customers and operators.We would recommend this product over other similir ones any time.
author: Ziga K.
pros: Software is extremly easy to use, it is very reliable and fast. Connecting to customer's PC is very simple and transperent.Customer support is always there and ready if you need it - but because the product works 99,9% we almost never use it.
cons: If you run program 24/7 as we do, you sometimes miss the software update which starts upon running the program and logging in.File management - transfers between local and remote computer is working OK but could get some UI and UX improvements.

review_title: Review of ISL
description: Great, fast, support is always avaliable and fast, easy to use, a lot of funcitons that others don't have.
author: Andraž C.
pros: Automatic handling image quality depending on internet speed so I can work even if I'm out of office and on slow internet connection. Option to set up untendant access. Fast download and install of isl client even if they are using it for the first time.
cons: Sometimes trouble with ctrl + C and ctrl + V not working when trying to copy text to client computer

review_title: Marles PSP
description: Since the introduction of ISLonline, I no longer need to be physically present at the user's computer. I have saved time and costs. File transfers are also fast,
author: Senad P.
pros: Access user computers from anywhere for quick assistance. The user experience is good. Access to multiple monitors on computers is also OK.
cons: Sometimes, it takes longer to refresh and access active computers (when it boots up). I have no other comments.

review_title: Reliable and Secure Remote Access at a Great Value
description: Overall, my experience with ISL Light has been very positive in terms of value for money. The software delivers reliable remote access and strong security at a fair price, especially compared to other solutions on the market. It feels like a solid investment for both daily support tasks and long-term use.
author: Jure F.
pros: What I liked most about ISL Light was its fast and reliable remote access, which made connecting to clients effortless. The interface is simple and intuitive, so even non-technical users can navigate it easily. I also appreciated the strong security features, which gave me confidence when working on sensitive systems.
cons: What I liked least about ISL Light was that customer support response times could sometimes be slower than expected. While the support team was helpful once connected, quicker assistance would make the experience even better.

review_title: Absolutely essential tool for remote unattended access and remote deployment
description: I work in an environment that is split across several buildings, using all kinds of devices, as well as remote workers over VPN, and this has been absolutely essentially when it has come to managing these devices. It has saved us during COVID in 2020, and continues to perform solidly after so many years. From all the remote tools we've tested, this has consistently remained at the top, and I cannot be without it. Thanks ISL!
author: Jassen P.
pros: Fantastic ease of use and deployment - it has been a boon going through Intune, and having concurrent access to machines unattended.
cons: Nothing I can think of right now, it has been a solid all rounder.

review_title: OGOMA inženiring review
description: very good experience, from buying, one day job to using it instantly and having no problem with it. everything ok
author: Matjaz O.
pros: easy to use, not much bandwidth to use. useful tool that you forget about it and it just works. great product
cons: as far as I use it (one cemputer remoto control work), basicall nothing. maybe that i could better use two screen mode.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy and fast to use remote support application
author: Frank N.
pros: ISL Light is provided as a small download, and after start it is easy to handle. It opens up, you give the session code, thats it.
cons: Some few applications do not allow to share the screen for security reasons. So ISL Light will show in this case the screen in black.

review_title: Very good software
author: Alberto C.
pros: You can very easily and in secure way connect to your remote servers and clients and you can sort them with categories.
cons: Nothing wrong about this product, we are fine with it

review_title: Easy to use remote access software
description: I am very pleased with ISL and would recommend this software to anyone who provides IT support
author: Anthony D.
pros: Very easy to use and set up on a client computer for when you need it
cons: Talking a client through downloading and running the software, if it isn't already on their computer some of them find it difficult to give me access remotely

review_title: Another year with ISL
author: Samuel B.
pros: The ease of use and the good performance it offers
cons: I wish it cost less but I'm not going to stop using it since it's worth it
